Blackwolf scout and disaster-source liaison visual lock

costume and prop handoff for black-grey wolf short pelt, dark-blue fitted snow-runner clothing, leather kneepads, forearm guards, bone whistle, short bow, three short javelins, snow claw footgear, dark-silver wolf-tooth buckle, and low crouched scouting posture

batch_rules: Do not redesign existing faction emblems.
The Northern Beastfolk Alliance emblem is locked; do not create a new Blackwolf clan crest, personal Wu Lan logo, wolf-head crest, chest badge, shoulder patch, banner, or modern mark.
Use the existing Wanshou system only as material and object-symbol language: bonewood knots, claw-tooth cuts, rawhide cord, oath cord, small carved tokens, bone whistle, and wolf-tooth buckle.

Wu Lan must read as a 19-25-year-old Blackwolf snowline scout and peripheral liaison, not a human youth with wolf ears, not a noble deer character, not heavy siege troop, not a cute mascot, and not a horror werewolf.

Preserve clear wolf muzzle, black wolf ears, long nose bridge, golden vertical pupils, low black-grey layered wolf tail, wolf facial tattooing, lean long-legged forward stance, black-grey short wolf pelt, dark-blue fitted snow-runner clothing, leather guards, bone whistle, short bow, three short javelins, snow claw footgear, and dark-silver wolf-tooth buckle.
Costume can be wind-worn and frost-dusted but must stay complete, clean, practical, cold-resistant, and scout-specific.
Low magic is not a main visual for this character; no giant wolf spirit, attack magic, large aura, blue fire dominance, spell circle, or floating weapon.
No visible text, labels, captions, UI, watermark, Chinese characters, or Latin letters inside generated images.
